original_client_text.markup_text:
happy Resurrection Sunday 🤍

this morning we made breakfast before church and it was so sweet… and very very messy 🤭

these moments aren’t always picture perfect. there are spills, sticky hands, and a lot of patience involved but this is what it really looks like cooking with littles.

#montessorimom #cookingwithtoddlers
